focus: Milestone flex: total unit profit + moneyline profit. All numbers from DAILY_AGSU_REPORT.md (post-July-3 grading).
mechanic: Milestone/authority flex (rotated off the morning's receipts recap); mantra RT line; forward tease close (no repeated 'who rode with us')

verifiedNumbers.total: +47.43u, 34 days live, 354 live picks, +5.1% ROI, +1.39u/day (report 'Bottom line')

hero_single.text:
+47 units since June 1.

34 days. 354 plays. Every one posted before lock.

And the engine behind it is the moneyline:

⚾ MLB ML — 171 plays, 55% winners, +7% ROI
⚽ Soccer ML — 18-7 (72%), +24% ROI

No parlays. No props. No hidden slips.

The public chases 10-leg lottery tickets. We grind the line that actually pays.

Holiday card drops before first pitch — the sharps don't take days off.

alt_hooks: 34 days ago we turned the model on. +47 units later, the moneyline is still the whole engine.
+47 units in 34 days — and almost all of it came from the least sexy bet in sports: the moneyline.

alternates.label: identity/anti-parlay lead
